expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: A large "SCROL DOWN" overlay is floating over the bottom of the page and obscuring part of the disclaimer/legal copy.
The overlay text says "SCROL DOWN" instead of "SCROLL DOWN".
The legal fine print at the bottom is extremely small and low-contrast, making it difficult to read.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing sports icon in the bottom nav bar; they all relate to a 'SCROL DOWN' overlay and legal text visibility.
